metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🖥️ Endpoint Health & Coverage
---
Shows the state of MDE deployment across the device fleet. Identifies devices not onboarded, patch and exposure gaps, the most alert-heavy devices, and Windows server security event anomalies. Designed for both SOC and IT operations audiences."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":2592000000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000},{"durationMs":7776000000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📊 Fleet Overview"},"name":"fleet-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), OnboardingStatus = take_any(OnboardingStatus), OSPlatform = take_any(OSPlatform), ExposureLevel = take_any(ExposureLevel), SensorHealthState = take_any(SensorHealthState) by DeviceId
| summarize
    TotalDevices = count(),
    Onboarded = countif(OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'),
    NotOnboarded = countif(OnboardingStatus != 'Onboarded'),
    HighExposure = countif(ExposureLevel == 'High'),
    SensorUnhealthy = countif(SensorHealthState != 'Active' and isnotempty(SensorHealthState))
| project TotalDevices, Onboarded, NotOnboarded, HighExposure, SensorUnhealthy","size":4,"title":"Device fleet summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalDevices","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-fleet"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), OnboardingStatus = take_any(OnboardingStatus), OSPlatform = take_any(OSPlatform) by DeviceId
| summarize DeviceCount = count() by OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus
| sort by DeviceCount desc","size":3,"title":"Devices by OS & onboarding status","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart","chartSettings":{"showLegend":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-os-onboarding"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), ExposureLevel = take_any(ExposureLevel) by DeviceId
| summarize DeviceCount = count() by ExposureLevel
| where isnotempty(ExposureLevel)","size":3,"title":"Devices by exposure level","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"High","color":"redBright"},{"seriesName":"Medium","color":"orange"},{"seriesName":"Low","color":"green"}]}},"customWidth":"25","name":"chart-exposure"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), SensorHealthState = take_any(SensorHealthState), DeviceName = take_any(DeviceName), OSPlatform = take_any(OSPlatform), MachineGroup = take_any(MachineGroup) by DeviceId
| where SensorHealthState != 'Active' and isnotempty(SensorHealthState)
| project DeviceName, SensorHealthState, OSPlatform, MachineGroup, LastSeen
| sort by LastSeen desc","size":0,"title":"Devices with unhealthy MDE sensor","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"SensorHealthState","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Active","representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"error","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"LastSeen","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"25","name":"table-unhealthy-sensors"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## ❌ Devices NOT Onboarded"},"name":"not-onboarded-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), OnboardingStatus = take_any(OnboardingStatus), OSPlatform = take_any(OSPlatform), OSVersion = take_any(OSVersion), DeviceType = take_any(DeviceType), MachineGroup = take_any(MachineGroup), DeviceName = take_any(DeviceName), PublicIP = take_any(PublicIP) by DeviceId
| where OnboardingStatus != 'Onboarded'
| project DeviceName, OnboardingStatus, OSPlatform, OSVersion, DeviceType, MachineGroup, LastSeen, PublicIP
| sort by LastSeen desc","size":0,"title":"Not onboarded device list","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"OnboardingStatus","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Onboarded","representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"error","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"LastSeen","formatter":6}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"LastSeen","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-not-onboarded"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔓 Vulnerability & Exposure

> **Note:** The `SecurityRecommendation` table requires the **Microsoft Defender for Cloud** or **MDVM** connector to be enabled. If recommendations show 0, enable the connector in Sentinel → Data connectors → Microsoft Defender for Cloud. The exposure level charts below use `DeviceInfo` which is always available."},"name":"vuln-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), ExposureLevel = max(ExposureLevel) by DeviceId
| where isnotempty(ExposureLevel)
| summarize
    HighExposure = countif(ExposureLevel == 'High'),
    MediumExposure = countif(ExposureLevel == 'Medium'),
    LowExposure = countif(ExposureLevel == 'Low'),
    TotalWithExposure = count()
| project TotalWithExposure, HighExposure, MediumExposure, LowExposure","size":4,"title":"Device exposure summary (from DeviceInfo)","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"HighExposure","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redBright"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-exposure-fallback"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityRecommendation
| where RecommendationState == 'Active'
| summarize
    TotalRecs = count(),
    HighRecs = countif(RecommendationSeverity == 'High'),
    MedRecs = countif(RecommendationSeverity == 'Medium'),
    AffectedDevices = dcount(DeviceId)
| project TotalRecs, HighRecs, MedRecs, AffectedDevices","size":4,"title":"Active vulnerability recommendations (requires Defender for Cloud connector)","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalRecs","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-vuln"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityRecommendation
| where RecommendationState == 'Active'
| summarize AffectedDevices = dcount(DeviceId) by RecommendationDisplayName, RecommendationSeverity
| sort by AffectedDevices desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Top active recommendations by affected devices","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"RecommendationSeverity","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"AffectedDevices","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"AffectedDevices","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-top-recs"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), ExposureLevel = take_any(ExposureLevel), MachineGroup = take_any(MachineGroup), OSPlatform = take_any(OSPlatform), DeviceName = take_any(DeviceName) by DeviceId
| where ExposureLevel == 'High'
| project DeviceName, ExposureLevel, OSPlatform, MachineGroup, LastSeen
| sort by LastSeen desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"High exposure devices","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ExposureLevel","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"LastSeen","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-high-exposure"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🚨 Alert Density by Device"},"name":"alert-density-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
| summarize
    TotalAlerts = count(),
    HighAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == 'High'),
    MedAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == 'Medium'),
    UniqueAlertTypes = dcount(AlertName)
    by DeviceName = CompromisedEntity
| sort by TotalAlerts desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Most alerted devices","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TotalAlerts","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}},{"columnMatch":"HighAlerts","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TotalAlerts","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-alert-density"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| summarize AlertCount = count() by AlertSeverity
| sort by AlertCount desc","size":3,"title":"Alert distribution by severity","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"High","color":"redBright"},{"seriesName":"Medium","color":"orange"},{"seriesName":"Low","color":"yellow"},{"seriesName":"Informational","color":"blue"}]}},"customWidth":"40","name":"chart-alert-severity"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔗 Cross-Layer: Devices with Alerts AND High Exposure"},"name":"correlation-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let RecommendedDevices = SecurityRecommendation
| where RecommendationState == 'Active' and RecommendationSeverity == 'High'
| summarize HighRecs = dcount(RecommendationName) by DeviceId;
DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), ExposureLevel = max(ExposureLevel), OSPlatform = max(OSPlatform), MachineGroup = max(MachineGroup), DeviceName = max(DeviceName) by DeviceId
| where ExposureLevel in ('High', 'Medium')
| join kind=leftouter (
    SecurityAlert
    | where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
    | summarize AlertCount = count(), HighAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == 'High') by CompromisedEntity
) on $left.DeviceName == $right.CompromisedEntity
| join kind=leftouter RecommendedDevices on DeviceId
| project DeviceName, ExposureLevel, OSPlatform, MachineGroup, AlertCount = coalesce(AlertCount, 0), HighAlerts = coalesce(HighAlerts, 0), HighRecs = coalesce(HighRecs, 0), LastSeen
| where AlertCount > 0 or HighRecs > 0
| sort by AlertCount desc","size":0,"title":"Devices with both active alerts and high vulnerability recommendations","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ExposureLevel","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"AlertCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}},{"columnMatch":"HighRecs","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}},{"columnMatch":"LastSeen","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-correlation"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🪟 Windows Server Security Events"},"name":"server-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4624, 4625, 4648, 4720, 4722, 4723, 4724, 4725, 4726, 4728, 4732, 4756)
| summarize
    SuccessLogons = countif(EventID == 4624),
    FailedLogons = countif(EventID == 4625),
    ExplicitCreds = countif(EventID == 4648),
    AccountCreated = countif(EventID == 4720),
    AccountEnabled = countif(EventID == 4722),
    AccountDeleted = countif(EventID == 4726),
    GroupMemberAdded = countif(EventID in (4728, 4732, 4756))
| project SuccessLogons, FailedLogons, ExplicitCreds, AccountCreated, AccountDeleted, GroupMemberAdded","size":4,"title":"Windows server event summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"SuccessLogons","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-security-events"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4720, 4726, 4728, 4732, 4756)
| project TimeGenerated, EventID, Account, TargetUserName, TargetDomainName, Computer
| extend EventDescription = case(
    EventID == 4720, 'Account created',
    EventID == 4726, 'Account deleted',
    EventID == 4728, 'Member added to global group',
    EventID == 4732, 'Member added to local group',
    EventID == 4756, 'Member added to universal group',
    'Other'
)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Account & group changes on servers","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TimeGenerated","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-account-changes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize FailedCount = count() by TargetUserName, IpAddress, Computer
| where FailedCount > 10
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Accounts with >10 failed logons on servers","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailedCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"FailedCount","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-server-logon-failures"}],"styleSettings":{},"fromTemplateId":"","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
